summary: Iteration 34 - Testing X button and back arrow fixes. X button (✕) works functionally (with force click), back arrow (←) has rendering issue. Both buttons have height collapsed to ~1.2px due to React Native Web lineHeight rendering bug. Despite small clickable area, X button still triggers navigation correctly.

ui_bugs.component: X button (✕) and Back arrow (←) in quiz.tsx
ui_bugs.issue: Both buttons using plain Text characters inside TouchableOpacity render with collapsed height (~1.2px instead of 44px). The closeButton style with width:44, height:44 is applied to TouchableOpacity but NOT inherited by child Text element. React Native Web renders Text with lineHeight:28 as ~1.2px. This is a React Native Web rendering bug.
ui_bugs.selector: TouchableOpacity with styles.closeButton around lines 411-419 and 505-511
ui_bugs.rca: lineHeight property in React Native Web Text does not behave like native RN. The lineHeight:28 renders as ~1.2px on web. The parent TouchableOpacity has correct dimensions but child Text collapses.

action_items: FIX REQUIRED: Replace plain Text character approach with View wrapper containing proper dimensions. Use View with explicit height/width containing Text, instead of relying on Text lineHeight.
Alternative: Use inline style with 'display: flex' and 'height: 44' on web platform-specific code
The X button and back arrow work with force=True clicks, but user on iOS/native may have touch target issues
critical_code_review_comments: X button (✕) navigation WORKS - clicking returns to quiz list correctly
Back arrow (←) navigation WORKS - routing configured correctly, but click target too small
Stats icon button WORKS - navigates to /quiz-stats
'Torna ai Quiz' button WORKS - seen in authenticated session test
All quiz features (tabs, navigation, submission) work correctly
The height issue is React Native Web specific - lineHeight doesn't translate to proper CSS height for emoji/symbol Text

success_rate.frontend: 75% (all features work functionally, but X/back buttons have small touch targets)

context_for_next_testing_agent: X button and back arrow work functionally but have 1.2px height due to RN Web lineHeight bug. Test with force=True for clicks. Quiz submission requires login. All 3 tabs (Tematici, Classici, Avanzato) work. Quiz flow complete with results shown.

features_tested.x_button_quiz_question: WORKS (with force click) - navigates back to quiz list with tabs visible
features_tested.back_arrow_quiz_list: WORKS (with force click on web) - routes to home, but height is 1.2px
features_tested.studio_avanzato_tab: WORKS - shows 6 subcategories with 8 questions each
features_tested.quiz_submission: WORKS (requires login) - shows results with score
features_tested.torna_ai_quiz_button: WORKS - seen in authenticated test returning to quiz list

bug_details.root_cause: React Native Web renders Text component lineHeight incorrectly. lineHeight: 28 results in actual CSS height of ~1.2px for single character Text like ✕ or ←
bug_details.current_style: closeButton: { width: 44, height: 44, justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center' }, closeButtonText: { fontSize: 24, lineHeight: 28 }
bug_details.suggested_fix: Wrap Text in View with explicit dimensions: <View style={{width:44, height:44, justifyContent:'center', alignItems:'center'}}><Text>✕</Text></View> OR use Platform.select for web-specific styling with inline CSS height
